impacts.statement: Water reaches the road level of the Arundel Road bridge.
0.2 percent flood Annual exceedance probability (AEP) Flood.
Water is at the bottom of the Arundel Road bridge. Highway 11 just south of Arundel Road has water on it.
Water approaches the level of railroad tracks south of Arundel Road and north of Bronson Road.
Water begins to flood portions of Bronson road on the west side of the creek.
